title: Marvelous Species
description: Compat mod for Species and Marvelous Menagerie: Paradoxical
body:
# About

Marvelous Species is a mod that brings direct compatibility between the mods Marvelous Menagerie: Paradoxical and Species, and as such requires both of them to function.

While most of the stuff added is datapack driven, it has been packed as a mod for easier installation and to make the addition of new items possible.

## New Summoning Rituals
This mod mainly adds fossils for the Cruncher, Springling and Goober that can be found in the loot tables for fossil cleaning, as well as their respective rituals to bring them to life.

## Limpets
Additionally, Limpets with Opal in their shells will spawn in your world between -32 and 32.
